title: RAIMZEAL — Title
description: Title slide: RAIMZEAL Free AI-Powered Healthcare for Every Human, ECONTEUR LLC / Dr. Ephraim Oviawe, June 2026

title: Executive Summary
description: RAIMZEAL delivers free, personalized healthcare to anyone with a smartphone — five key points

title: The Problem
description: 5.4 billion people lack access to personalized, affordable preventive healthcare

title: Platform Overview
description: Six health disciplines — fitness, food therapy, mental wellness, community, sleep, preventive care

title: Technology Stack
description: Expo SDK 54, Supabase, Express 5, OpenAI — ~$57/month total infrastructure

title: Non-Profit Business Model
description: 501(c)(3) pathway, grant funding, institutional partnerships — free forever

title: Market Opportunity
description: TAM 8B, SAM 4.5B, Year 1 target 10M users — no comparable free multi-discipline platform

title: Financial Overview
description: $51/month operating cost — $500K grant funds 8+ years of full operations

title: Leadership
description: Dr. Ephraim Oviawe — physician, founder, ECONTEUR LLC

title: Governance & Equity
description: Mission-first equity: 85% founder, 15% advisor pool — free-access prohibition in all agreements

title: 2026–2027 Roadmap
description: Q2 iOS launch, Q3 Android + 501(c)(3), Q4 first grant, H1 2027 WHO application

title: Closing
description: Health is a right, not a privilege — grant partnerships, advisory relationships, in-kind contributions
